# rapid7_siem_log_search_query (Ephemeral Resource)

Use this data source to retrieve the results of a [log search query](https://docs.rapid7.com/insightidr/log-search/#search-your-log-data)



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `logs` (Set of String) Identifiers of the logs on which the query will run
- `query` (String) A [LEQL query](https://docs.rapid7.com/insightidr/log-search/#write-a-leql-query) expressing the search criteria
- `range` (Attributes) Bounds of the time range which the search is executed on (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--range))

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of results to return
- `order` (String) Order in which matching log lines are returned
  * `ASC` - Oldest log lines are returned first
  * `DESC` - Newest log lines are returned first

### Read-Only

- `results` (Attributes List) Log lines matching the query (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--results))

<a id="nestedatt--range"></a>
### Nested Schema for `range`

Required:

- `from` (String) Timestamp of oldest log line considered
- `to` (String) Timestamp of newest log line considered


<a id="nestedatt--results"></a>
### Nested Schema for `results`

Required:

- `log_id` (String) Identifier of the log which this result belongs to
- `message` (String) Content of the log line
- `sequence` (String) Sub-millisecond ordering of log entries
- `timestamp` (String) Time the log entry was ingested into the log
